title: Degrees
content:
A young theologian named Fiddle
         Refused to accept his degree;
        "For," said he, "'tis enough to be Fiddle,
         Without being Fiddle D.D."
meaning:
"Degrees" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
